title: X-ray 4-point test
body:
**Out Loud** This is the title of the website [**xarop.net**](http://www.xarop.net), a blog I only recently discovered. We share a name—and it seems we share a few other things as well:

1.  **xarop** is the first username we both used online.
2.  We both now use our initials as our usernames. **edp** vs **ajl**
3.  We share hobbies like hiking, the internet, and especially [**Web 2.0**](http://www.xarop.com/que-es-la-web-20/)
4.  We are Catalans with political concerns and a rebellious streak

Although **edp** is quite a bit more active on his blog. Could it be because he’s been a “civil servant” at Telefónica for 26 years, while I’ve had countless different jobs over the past 15 years?
